headline: Assurant’s 2026 Global Connected Consumer Trends Report Finds That as Connected Tech Becomes More Critical, Reliability, Support, and Transparency Matter More Than Ever
summary: ATLANTA, June 09, 2026--Assurant, Inc. (NYSE: AIZ), a global company that redefines the boundaries of protection – safeguarding and servicing connected devices, homes, automobiles, and commercial equipment in partnership with the world’s most successful brands, released its 2026 Global Connected Consumer Trends Report (GCCTR), highlighting how consumers view connected technology as no longer being just a convenience; it is now critical infrastructure in everyday life.
